description: Prepare a presentation-ready treatment plan for a single dental implant in the lower right posterior jaw using the CBCT scan at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DentalDICOM. The plan must demonstrate safe implant placement with adequate clearance from the inferior alveolar nerve and include appropriate panoramic curve alignment. Save the plan to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks\complete_plan.bsp and export a screenshot to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks\complete_plan_screenshot.png. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
